title: geum aleppicum subsp. strictum
intro: Geum aleppicum subsp. strictum, also known as strict geum, is a perennial plant species in the rose family that is native to the northern United States and Canada. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Geum aleppicum subsp. strictum are attributed to its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues and other health problems.
